mission: Fix tool Layer never-mismatch — 82 TS2345 errors + 6 Schema.Literal API issues

expected_framework_changes.description: Add R generic to Def interface for execute's required services channel. Propagate through DefWithoutID, Init, Info, define.

current_types.Init: Init<P, M> = DefWithoutID<P, M> | (() => Effect<DefWithoutID<P, M>>)
current_types.Info: Info<P, M> { id: string, init: () => Effect<DefWithoutID<P, M>> }
current_types.define: define<P, M, R>(id, init: Effect<Init<P, M>, never, R>): Effect<Info<P, M>, never, R | Truncate | Agent>

expected_target_types.Def: Def<P, M, R=never> { execute(args, ctx): Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, R> }
expected_target_types.DefWithoutID: DefWithoutID<P, M, R=never> = Omit<Def<P, M, R>, 'id'>
expected_target_types.Init: Init<P, M, R=never> = DefWithoutID<P, M, R> | (() => Effect<DefWithoutID<P, M, R>>)
expected_target_types.Info: Info<P, M, R=never> { id: string, init: () => Effect<DefWithoutID<P, M, R>> }
expected_target_types.define: define<P, M, R, R2=never, ID>(id, init: Effect<Init<P, M, R2>, never, R>): Effect<Info<P, M, R2>, never, R | R2 | Truncate | Agent> & { id: ID }

expected_tool_changes.description: 14 tool files with execute() yielding services — types should auto-resolve after framework fix

schema_literal_fixes.description: 6 files use Schema.Literal(a,b,c) — should be Schema.Literals([a,b,c])

dirty_file_preservation.note: 19 tool files are dirty — any edits MUST be additive
